name: Rocking Legend
short_description: Shred your guitar or smash your drum set like a rockstar! Play the original soundtrack in dynamic stages, progress through the campaign to get new skins, or customize your experience with custom songs, gameplay modifiers, and multiple control schemas!
detailed_description:
Rocking Legend is a musical game where you'll take the part of a virtual rock star immersed in beautiful and dynamic environments.

Choose between guitar or drums and immediately go on stage in free-play mode. Alternatively, you can participate in the single-player campaign through a series of levels and original soundtracks created purposely for the game to improve your skills and unlock new instrument skins. If you don't want to play alone, you can even play in multiplayer PvP or cooperatively in a band of two!

Compete on the global leaderboards using your preferred control scheme and a selection of gameplay modifiers.

Guitar modes:


  • Finger-tracked (only index controllers at the moment)
  • Hand-tracked with two sub-modes: Classic or Advanced
  • PC Keyboard / Game controllers support




Drums features:


  • Play with the virtual drum set
  • Adjust the height and position for each drum piece
  • Two notes visualization modes: on-piece or in-line
  • Optional drum-kick
  • PC Keyboard / Game controllers support

Gameplay modifiers:


  • Note speed multiplier
  • Song playback speed
  • Random dynamic lane speed
  • Bomb notes
  • Lane changing notes
  • Invisible notes
  • Automatic plectrum
  • and more!

Tracklist:


The game ships with 18 original songs explicitly created for the game, charted in multiple levels, grouped by instrument type, and available on various difficulty levels. You can also play custom songs made with external tools.

Three game modes:


  • Campaign: learn the fundamentals and improve your skills through a series of increasingly challenging levels, while unlocking new instrument skins
  • Free play: customize your experience and compete on the global leaderboards
  • Multiplayer: play in a band of two in coop mode or compete in VS for the highest score

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
